description: This is a modern, minimalist wooden bed frame with a matching headboard. The bed is made with a light wood finish, giving it a natural and clean aesthetic. The mattress is covered in a neutral-toned fabric, and on top, there's a comforter with a subtle texture. A striking accent is the throw blanket draped across the foot of the bed, featuring bold green and white stripes, adding a touch of visual interest. Beside the bed, a small, matching wooden nightstand is present, equipped with two dark drawers and topped with a contemporary lamp and a mobile phone, suggesting functionality and comfort.
